title: Professional Membership Renewal
description: Renew your Professional Membership and log your professional development for the year.

year.label: Renewal year
year.help: Year is pre-filled from the link.

pdEntries.label: Professional Development entries
pdEntries.help: Log at least 10 hours/year. Add one row per activity.

pdEntries.activity.label: Activity
pdEntries.activity.placeholder: e.g. course, webinar, book, PD event
